case_title: CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS VS. QUALITY CARE HOMES, LLC

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHIEF, DIVISION OF LABOR STANDARDS ENFORCEMENT AUTHORIZED DELEGEE OF THE DIRECTOR OF INDUSTRIAL RELATIONS ADMINISTRATOR OF THE UNINSURED EMPLOYERS FUND STATE OF CALIFORNIA AS TO DEFENDANT QUALITY CARE HOMES, LLC A LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY DBA QUALITY CARE HOMES AKA QUALITY CARE HOMES LLC1, AKA QUALITY CARE HOMES LLC2, AKA QUALITY CARE HOMES LLC3, AKA QUALITY CARE HOMES LLC4 JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
